{
  "ontology_version": "1.0",
  "source_markdown": "docs/some-Tasks-parts-systems.md",
  "extraction_note": "Synthetically extracted and normalized from the task markdown and existing MMSS blocks.",
  "MMSS_OMEGA_TERMINAL_STATE": {
    "metadata": {
      "version": "v1.0",
      "merge_status": "stable",
      "mode": "local_auto_research"
    },
    "unified_axioms": [
      "score is numeric",
      "one small asset change per round",
      "local Ollama only",
      "keep and revert based on score",
      "reports are deterministic enough to compare"
    ],
    "core_operators": [
      "quantization",
      "soliton_dynamics",
      "adaptive_thresholding",
      "report_aggregation",
      "asset_mutation"
    ],
    "cross_layer_protocol": {
      "read": [
        "auto_research/instructions.md",
        "omega_core.json",
        "python/configs/active.yaml"
      ],
      "write": [
        "python/configs/*.yaml",
        "mmss_specs/*.json",
        "llm/prompts/*.md",
        "logs/auto_research_log.jsonl"
      ],
      "keep_or_revert": "accept if score improves above epsilon, otherwise restore previous asset content"
    },
    "deployment_and_metrics": {
      "primary_metric": "score",
      "optimization_direction": "maximize",
      "report_contract": [
        "test_acc_clean",
        "test_acc_perturbed",
        "inference_latency_ms",
        "energy_rel_v4",
        "alpha",
        "delta",
        "alpha_delta_ratio",
        "eta_tern",
        "zeta_Z3",
        "V",
        "N",
        "S",
        "Df",
        "GS",
        "RT",
        "goldenscore"
      ]
    },
    "termination_proof": {
      "stop_conditions": [
        "target score reached",
        "plateau reached",
        "stop.flag present",
        "manual operator stop"
      ]
    }
  },
  "systems": {
